name: Glovo Food and On-Demand Delivery API
what_it_does: Glovo food and on-demand delivery platform API for restaurant operators, retail partners, and enterprise brands to manage menus, receive orders, and run delivery operations through Glovo's marketplace across Southern Europe, Eastern Europe, and Africa — a Delivery Hero subsidiary operating in Spain, Italy, Poland, Romania, Ukraine, Morocco, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Kenya, and other markets. Enables AI agents to manage restaurant menu for catalog item automation, handle order receiving for kitchen workflow automation, access delivery tracking for courier dispatch automation, retrieve venue availability for status management automation, manage product catalog for retail partner automation, handle order status for customer communication automation, access performance analytics for business reporting automation, retrieve promotional campaign for marketing automation, manage multi-store for franchise chain automation, and integrate Glovo with POS systems and restaurant management platforms for end-to-end delivery operations automation across Southern European and African markets.
use_cases: Receiving and processing Glovo food orders for restaurant POS integration automation agents
Managing menu availability and pricing for multi-location restaurant chain automation agents
Tracking courier delivery status for customer notification automation agents
Accessing sales and operational analytics for restaurant performance reporting agents
not_for: Markets outside Glovo's operating countries (primarily Southern Europe, Eastern Europe, Africa)
Consumer ordering applications (Glovo API is for merchant and logistics partners only)
High-value specialized logistics requiring custom SLA (Glovo is mass-market delivery)
best_when: A restaurant operator or retail brand in Spain, Italy, Poland, or Glovo's African markets wanting AI agents to integrate with Glovo's delivery platform for automated order management and menu control.
avoid_when: PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Glovo merchant API requires Glovo restaurant or retail partner agreement; automated self-service developer API assumption creates no access; automated must sign Glovo partnership agreement before API access is granted. ORDER SLA IS STRICT: Glovo orders must be confirmed within tight window or auto-cancel with partner score impact; automated slow processing creates order cancellations; automated must maintain real-time webhook consumer for order events. DELIVERY HERO OWNERSHIP: Glovo is Delivery Hero subsidiary; automated independent Glovo platform assumption should monitor for platform integration with Delivery Hero's other brands (Foodpanda, Talabat etc.); automated long-term integrations should watch platform roadmap. MARKET-SPECIFIC COVERAGE: Glovo's product features and supported integrations vary by market; automated feature parity assumption across all Glovo markets creates regional errors; automated must check market-specific feature availability.

auth.notes: Glovo uses OAuth 2.0 for partner API authentication. REST API with JSON. Barcelona, Spain HQ. Founded 2015 by Oscar Pierre and Sacha Michaud. Delivery Hero subsidiary (acquired 2022, €2.3B). Products: Food delivery, grocery delivery, on-demand retail, dark stores. SDKs: None public. GDPR compliant. Operates in ES, IT, PL, RO, UA, MA, CI, GH, KE, SN, TN, UG and others. 65,000+ partner stores. Competes with Uber Eats and Just Eat in Southern Europe.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved partners; production requires Glovo partnership agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Restaurant commission: 20-30% per order; logistics fee varies by city; technology partner: negotiated
pricing.notes: Barcelona ES. Delivery Hero subsidiary. Commission per order. Partnership required. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; order webhooks near real-time; catalog APIs throttled

known_agent_gotchas: ORDER CONFIRMATION WINDOW IS TIGHT: Glovo orders have strict acceptance window; automated delayed processing creates auto-cancellation and partner rating impact; automated must implement low-latency webhook consumer for near-instant order acknowledgment

OAUTH PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Glovo partner OAuth credentials are not self-serve; automated developer portal key assumption creates no credentials; automated must complete Glovo partnership onboarding to receive OAuth client credentials

MENU SYNC IS ASYNC: Glovo menu updates propagate with delay; automated immediate menu change visibility assumption creates stale catalog during propagation window; automated should track update submission and expected propagation time

MARKET-SPECIFIC CURRENCY AND TAX: Glovo operates in 20+ countries with different currencies and VAT requirements; automated single-currency item pricing creates incorrect pricing in other markets; automated must configure country-specific pricing and tax rates per venue

STORE STATUS AFFECTS DISCOVERY: Glovo store open/closed status controls marketplace visibility and order routing; automated neglect of status management creates missed orders or orders arriving when kitchen is closed; automated must synchronize store status with operational hours
agent_readiness.security_notes: Food delivery. GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. EU/ES. Customer order and delivery data. Delivery Hero subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: On-demand delivery. GDPR, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. EU/ES. Customer and order data.
